rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Implementation-level contracts should use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by placing AGREE contracts in valid scopes relative to component structure
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Use only visible ports and features in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Guarantee statements should relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type scope
anti_patterns: Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
